title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, King, Yamato, Kid, Unknown person #6, Luffy as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: RING RING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oniga- Shima is in chaos

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were forced to be here against your will, if you're planning a betrayal

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Now would be your best chance

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you'd just allow that to happen? Don't look down on me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: RING RING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What are you trying to predict?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the probability of 7WHAT MAN being alive tomorrow morning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Only 1%? I feel bad for him...

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.text: Is this King calling?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: As I'm sure you're well aware

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The situation at hand has gotten completely out of control

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 5,000 intrudes managed to infiltrated our banquet of 30 000 men....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You could say that this is our greatest failure since Onigashima was founded!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are putting our infighting on hold starting now!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Even if you capture young master yamato,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You won't earn the right to challenge the all-stars....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: No way! Are you kidding me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Obviously!! Have a look around you Sis!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oh! Pay..pay

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yamato climbed over the wall and got away,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I was going to wait here and get pay-pay to give me a piggy- Back ride...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shut up, you shitty brats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WHO ARE YOU CALLING BRATS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido-san is on the roof.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: URRA- GOHH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The enemy is aiming to reach him by ascending the castle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each of you are to do what- ever it takes to stop them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't understand- mate them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: May the fortunes of war be with you.

dialogue.speaker: X Drake
dialogue.text: Hey, X Drake..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This chaos is our chance, come with me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This would be a little too tough to do alone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: .....? where are we going?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to kill a guy that I've wanted to kill....!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: QUEEN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't drag me into your little feud!...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you trying to weaken our forces?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if he's here, he'd only be a pain in the ass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I really don't feel like it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KEEP GOING!!!/

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Straw- HATS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WE ARE GOING TO EscORT THEM RIGHT INTO THE CASTLE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: gyaa- Ahh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't get ahead of your- selves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You filthy Prison- NERS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AAR- GHH!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
